name: ermis-ekyc-sdk
description: Ermis eKYC SDK - OCR, Liveness Detection, Face Match

scripts.demo:install: npm run build && cd examples/demo && npm install
scripts.demo: npm run build && concurrently -n sdk,demo -c blue,green "tsc --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "cd examples/demo && npm run dev"
